GpuProjectExec
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
          GpuHashJoinExec
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
          GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=76
                      GpuScanExec: row_width=76, subtree_max_row_bytes=76
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=176
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=120, subtree_max_row_bytes=120
